MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-14-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. SACRAMENTO COUNTY'S SHERIFF SEEKS AN ORDER REGARDING "DISPOSITION OF PROPERTY OR FUNDS SEIZED," BUT AT THE SAME TIME REPORTS "$0.00" SEIZED. THE "PROPERTY" DEBTOR CLAIMS "TO BE EXEMPT" IS "DISCOVER BANK CREDIT CARD DEBIT," WHICH MAKES NO SENSE. CREDITOR FAILS TO RESPOND TO WHAT SEEMS TO BE DEBTOR'S MAIN ARGUMENT - STATUTES OF LIMITATIONS. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Sacramento County's sheriff seeks an order regarding "Disposition of property or funds seized," but at the same time reports "$0.00" seized.

The "property" debtor claims "to be exempt" is "Discover Bank Credit Card Debit," which makes no sense.

Creditor fails to respond to what seems to be debtor's main argument - statutes of limitations.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
